message:
fix(demo): use title_from_markup for composition card titles (bd-2szv)

The composition cards were using .title("[green]us-west-2[/]") which
doesn't parse markup. This caused the literal "[green]..." string to be
used as the title, making it wider than expected and misaligning the
panel headers with content rows.

Changed to .title_from_markup() to properly parse Rich markup tags.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
